prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: high-fidelity clean iPhone app UI screen, portrait, no device frame
Primary request: Create a less dense anime-themed WakeSaga onboarding/app UI screen for iPhone. Screen 1: Tomorrow's Episode setup before bed.
Design thesis: native iPhone app UI first, anime identity second. Use one calm anime protagonist/avatar illustration as the focal accent, then simple iOS-style cards and controls.
Required readable UI text only: "Tomorrow's Episode", "Set up your opening scene", "Mission", "Hard thing before noon", "Wake Gate", "Feet on floor + water", "Narrator", "Mentor", "Generate Opening".
Visual language: clean iOS product design, generous whitespace, safe-area spacing, large rounded cards, warm off-white background, black text, soft sunrise gold, coral red, sky cyan accents, one original anime avatar/hero illustration, subtle manga sparkle or line accents only.
Composition/framing: iPhone 15/16 style vertical screen with status/safe area implied, top navigation/header, one hero/avatar area, three stacked setup cards, large sticky bottom CTA. Max 4 main UI zones. Large 44pt+ tap targets. Text must be readable and uncluttered.
Constraints: no dense manga grid, no poster collage, no tiny thumbnails, no more than three option chips in a row, no fake Japanese text, no copyrighted anime characters, no existing anime franchise references, no random stats, no fake metrics, no RPG HUD, no generic purple AI gradient, no overlapping text, no watermark.

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: high-fidelity clean iPhone app UI screen, portrait, no device frame
Primary request: Create a less dense anime-themed WakeSaga iPhone screen. Screen 2: Alarm Ready after tomorrow's opening has been generated.
Design thesis: make it feel like a real iPhone alarm app with a beautiful anime episode preview card, not a busy poster.
Required readable UI text only: "6:45 AM", "Alarm Ready", "No More Snooze Arc", "Mission", "Hard thing before noon", "Wake Gate", "Stand up + confirm", "Audio ready", "Edit", "Lock Alarm".
Visual language: clean Apple-like mobile UI, large breathing room, one cinematic original anime sunrise card, soft cream surface, black type, coral red lock CTA, cyan small accents, rounded cards, subtle shadow, minimal sticker detail.
Composition/framing: portrait iPhone app screen with safe area, huge alarm time near top, one large episode preview card, two compact info cards, audio-ready status row, bottom action bar with Edit and Lock Alarm. Max 4 main UI zones, no clutter.
Constraints: no dense manga panels, no hand-lettered giant words covering the interface, no tiny unreadable labels, no fake Japanese text, no copyrighted anime IP, no random stats, no fake social proof, no RPG game HUD, no generic neon gradient, no overlapping text, no watermark.

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: high-fidelity clean iPhone app UI screen, portrait, no device frame
Primary request: Create a less dense anime-themed WakeSaga iPhone alarm screen. Screen 3: Wake Gate while the alarm is ringing.
Design thesis: urgent but simple iPhone utility screen. Anime energy appears as one small cut-in/character illustration and motion accent, while controls remain big and clear.
Required readable UI text only: "6:45", "Wake Jolt Playing", "Stand up to unlock", "Action 1 of 1", "I'm Up", "Snooze 5", "Episode unlocks after this".
Visual language: modern iPhone alarm UI, off-white/cream background, huge clean time, black typography, coral red urgency accents, yellow primary CTA, small anime cut-in/avatar, simple waveform, rounded cards, large bottom controls.
Composition/framing: portrait iPhone screen with safe-area top, large time, audio waveform card, central wake gate card, oversized primary CTA, secondary snooze button, tiny next-step preview. Max 4 main UI zones. Big touch targets and lots of whitespace.
Constraints: no battle poster collage, no screaming full-screen character art, no dense speed-line background, no fake Japanese text, no copyrighted anime character, no random score, no fake metrics, no RPG HUD, no generic purple AI gradient, no overlapping text, no watermark.

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: high-fidelity clean iPhone app UI screen, portrait, no device frame
Primary request: Create a less dense anime-themed WakeSaga iPhone screen. Screen 4: Morning Episode player and clean Wake Card preview after the gate is complete.
Design thesis: modern iPhone audio/player UI with collectible anime identity. The share card should be simple and screenshot-able, not overloaded.
Required readable UI text only: "Morning Episode", "No More Snooze Arc", "2 min opening for today", "Mission", "First Move", "Start First Move", "Today's Wake Card", "Episode 001", "6:45 AM", "Save", "Share".
Visual language: native-feeling iOS audio player, clean cards, large typography, warm paper background, black ink, coral red CTA, sky cyan share action, one original anime card illustration, subtle manga borders only on the collectible card.
Composition/framing: portrait iPhone screen with safe area, top player card with progress bar, two simple mission rows, primary CTA, one large clean Wake Card preview, save/share buttons. Max 4 main UI zones, clear spacing, readable text.
Constraints: no dense collectible card with tiny labels, no manga panel grid, no fake Japanese text, no copyrighted anime IP, no fake scores, no fake likes, no arbitrary badges, no RPG HUD, no generic neon AI gradient, no overlapping text, no watermark.
